question: True or False: The United Nations was founded after World War II.

conversation.content: True or False: The United Nations was founded after World War II.
True. The United Nations was founded on October 24, 1945, following the end of World War II (September 1945) to promote peace and international cooperation. then the answer: True

True. World War II ended in 1945 (V-E Day in May; V-J Day in September) and the UN Charter was ratified and the United Nations officially came into existence on October 24, 1945, after the war. then the answer: True
